final:
module RefModule(				
  input [31:0] InstrD,			
  input        BusyE,			
  output       StartD			
  );parameter
    RType = 6'b000000,			
    MULT  = 6'b011000,			
    MULTU = 6'b011001,			
    DIV   = 6'b011010,			
    DIVU  = 6'b011011;			
  
  assign StartD = (BusyE) ? 0 :
                  (
                    (InstrD[31:26] == RType &&
                      (InstrD[5:0] == MULT || InstrD[5:0] == MULTU ||
                       InstrD[5:0] == DIV  || InstrD[5:0] == DIVU)
                    ) ? 1 : 0
                  );
  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
